content.description: Monitors activity against all WS-Trust authentication endpoints. Tracks which endpoints are being hit, by whom, and from where. Includes a security indicator that alerts if any high-risk endpoints receive traffic.
content.eai:data:
<dashboard version="2" theme="light">
    <label>ADFS: WS-Trust Endpoint Activity</label>
    <description>Monitors activity against all WS-Trust authentication endpoints. Tracks which endpoints are being hit, by whom, and from where. Includes a security indicator that alerts if any high-risk endpoints receive traffic.</description>
    <definition><![CDATA[
{
	"title": "ADFS: WS-Trust Endpoint Activity",
	"description": "Monitors activity against all WS-Trust authentication endpoints. Tracks which endpoints are being hit, by whom, and from where. Includes a security indicator that alerts if any high-risk endpoints receive traffic.",
	"inputs": {
		"input_global_trp": {
			"options": {
				"defaultValue": "@d,now",
				"token": "global_time"
			},
			"title": "Time Range",
			"type": "input.timerange"
		},
		"input_endpoint_filter": {
			"options": {
				"defaultValue": "*",
				"token": "endpoint_input",
				"items": [
					{
						"label": "All Endpoints",
						"value": "*"
					},
					{
						"label": "13/certificate",
						"value": "13/certificate"
					},
					{
						"label": "13/certificatemixed",
						"value": "13/certificatemixed"
					},
					{
						"label": "13/certificatetransport",
						"value": "13/certificatetransport"
					},
					{
						"label": "13/issuedtokenasymmetricbasic256",
						"value": "13/issuedtokenasymmetricbasic256"
					},
					{
						"label": "13/issuedtokenmixedasymmetricbasic256",
						"value": "13/issuedtokenmixedasymmetricbasic256"
					},
					{
						"label": "13/issuedtokenmixedsymmetricbasic256",
						"value": "13/issuedtokenmixedsymmetricbasic256"
					},
					{
						"label": "13/issuedtokensymmetricbasic256",
						"value": "13/issuedtokensymmetricbasic256"
					},
					{
						"label": "13/kerberosmixed",
						"value": "13/kerberosmixed"
					},
					{
						"label": "13/usernamemixed",
						"value": "13/usernamemixed"
					},
					{
						"label": "13/windowsmixed",
						"value": "13/windowsmixed"
					},
					{
						"label": "13/windowstransport",
						"value": "13/windowstransport"
					},
					{
						"label": "2005/certificate",
						"value": "2005/certificate"
					},
					{
						"label": "2005/certificatemixed",
						"value": "2005/certificatemixed"
					},
					{
						"label": "2005/certificatetransport",
						"value": "2005/certificatetransport"
					},
					{
						"label": "2005/issuedtokenasymmetricbasic256",
						"value": "2005/issuedtokenasymmetricbasic256"
					},
					{
						"label": "2005/issuedtokenmixedasymmetricbasic256",
						"value": "2005/issuedtokenmixedasymmetricbasic256"
					},
					{
						"label": "2005/issuedtokenmixedsymmetricbasic256",
						"value": "2005/issuedtokenmixedsymmetricbasic256"
					},
					{
						"label": "2005/issuedtokensymmetricbasic256",
						"value": "2005/issuedtokensymmetricbasic256"
					},
					{
						"label": "2005/kerberosmixed",
						"value": "2005/kerberosmixed"
					},
					{
						"label": "2005/usernamemixed",
						"value": "2005/usernamemixed"
					},
					{
						"label": "2005/windowsmixed",
						"value": "2005/windowsmixed"
					},
					{
						"label": "2005/windowstransport",
						"value": "2005/windowstransport"
					},
					{
						"label": "mex",
						"value": "mex"
					}
				]
			},
			"title": "Endpoint Filter",
			"type": "input.multiselect"
		},
		"input_ip_filter": {
			"options": {
				"defaultValue": "*",
				"token": "ip_input"
			},
			"title": "IP Filter",
			"type": "input.text"
		}
	},
	"defaults": {
		"dataSources": {
			"ds.search": {
				"options": {
					"queryParameters": {
						"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$",
						"latest": "$global_time.latest$"
					}
				}
			}
		}
	},
	"visualizations": {
		"viz_total_hits": {
			"type": "splunk.singlevalue",
			"title": "Total Hits",
			"dataSources": {
				"primary": "ds_total_hits"
			},
			"showProgressBar": false,
			"showLastUpdated": false
		},
		"viz_unique_ips": {
			"type": "splunk.singlevalue",
			"title": "Unique Source IPs",
			"dataSources": {
				"primary": "ds_unique_ips"
			},
			"showProgressBar": false,
			"showLastUpdated": false
		},
		"viz_unique_endpoints": {
			"type": "splunk.singlevalue",
			"title": "Unique Endpoints Hit",
			"dataSources": {
				"primary": "ds_unique_endpoints"
			},
			"showProgressBar": false,
			"showLastUpdated": false
		},
		"viz_top_ip": {
			"type": "splunk.singlevalue",
			"title": "Top Source IP",
			"dataSources": {
				"primary": "ds_top_ip"
			},
			"showProgressBar": false,
			"showLastUpdated": false
		},
		"viz_timeline": {
			"type": "splunk.line",
			"title": "Hit Timeline by Endpoint",
			"dataSources": {
				"primary": "ds_timeline"
			},
			"options": {
				"lineWidth": 2,
				"nullValueDisplay": "zero",
				"legendDisplay": "right",
				"legendMode": "standard",
				"xAxisTitleVisibility": "show",
				"yAxisTitleVisibility": "show",
				"yAxisAbbreviation": "auto",
				"yAxisScale": "linear",
				"dataValuesDisplay": "off",
				"showSplitSeries": false
			},
			"showProgressBar": false,
			"showLastUpdated": false
		},
		"viz_matrix": {
			"type": "splunk.table",
			"title": "Endpoint × Source IP × User × Server FQDN — Hit Matrix",
			"dataSources": {
				"primary": "ds_matrix"
			},
			"options": {
				"count": 100,
				"drilldown": "none",
				"showRowNumbers": false,
				"headerVisibility": "fixed"
			},
			"showProgressBar": false,
			"showLastUpdated": false
		},
		"viz_endpoint_dist": {
			"type": "splunk.pie",
			"title": "Endpoint Distribution",
			"dataSources": {
				"primary": "ds_endpoint_dist"
			},
			"options": {
				"labelDisplay": "valuesAndPercentage"
			},
			"showProgressBar": false,
			"showLastUpdated": false
		},
		"viz_site_dist": {
			"type": "splunk.pie",
			"title": "Site Distribution",
			"dataSources": {
				"primary": "ds_site_dist"
			},
			"options": {
				"labelDisplay": "valuesAndPercentage"
			},
			"showProgressBar": false,
			"showLastUpdated": false
		},
		"viz_top_users": {
			"type": "splunk.table",
			"title": "Top Users by Endpoint",
			"dataSources": {
				"primary": "ds_top_users"
			},
			"options": {
				"count": 20,
				"drilldown": "none",
				"showRowNumbers": false,
				"headerVisibility": "fixed"
			},
			"showProgressBar": false,
			"showLastUpdated": false
		},
		"viz_risky_hits": {
			"type": "splunk.singlevalue",
			"title": "⚠ Risky Endpoint Hits — usernamemixed / certificatemixed / issuedtokenmixed / mex",
			"dataSources": {
				"primary": "ds_risky_hits"
			},
			"options": {
				"majorColor": "> majorValue | rangeValue(majorColorEditorConfig)",
				"majorColorEditorConfig": [
					{
						"to": 1,
						"value": "#118832"
					},
					{
						"from": 1,
						"value": "#D41F1F"
					}
				]
			},
			"showProgressBar": false,
			"showLastUpdated": false
		}
	},
	"dataSources": {
		"ds_total_hits": {
			"name": "Total hits",
			"options": {
				"query": "index=windows_events EventCode=403 (host=*-ess-sen-adf5* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso1* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso2*)\n| rex field=Message \"Url Absolute Path:\\s+(?<url_path>/adfs/services/trust/[^\\s]+)\"\n| rex field=Message \"Client IP:\\s+(?<client_ip>[\\d.]+)\"\n| rex field=Message \"Instance ID:\\s+(?<instance_id>[0-9A-Fa-f-]{36})\"\n| where isnotnull(url_path)\n| eval endpoint_short = replace(url_path, \"/adfs/services/trust/\", \"\")\n| where (\"$endpoint_input$\"=\"*\" OR endpoint_short=\"$endpoint_input$\")\n| join type=left instance_id\n    [search index=windows_events EventCode=510 (host=*-ess-sen-adf5* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso1* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso2*)\n    | rex \"Instance ID:\\s*(?<instance_id>[0-9A-Fa-f-]{36})\"\n    | rex field=_raw \"True-Client-IP\\\":\\\"(?<source_ip>[^\\\"]+)\"\n    | where isnotnull(source_ip)\n    | dedup instance_id\n    | fields instance_id source_ip]\n| eval ip = coalesce(source_ip, client_ip, \"Unknown\")\n| where (\"$ip_input$\"=\"*\" OR ip=\"$ip_input$\")\n| stats count as \"Total Hits\"",
				"queryParameters": {
					"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$",
					"latest": "$global_time.latest$"
				}
			},
			"type": "ds.search"
		},
		"ds_unique_ips": {
			"name": "Unique source IPs",
			"options": {
				"query": "index=windows_events EventCode=403 (host=*-ess-sen-adf5* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso1* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso2*)\n| rex field=Message \"Url Absolute Path:\\s+(?<url_path>/adfs/services/trust/[^\\s]+)\"\n| rex field=Message \"Client IP:\\s+(?<client_ip>[\\d.]+)\"\n| rex field=Message \"Instance ID:\\s+(?<instance_id>[0-9A-Fa-f-]{36})\"\n| where isnotnull(url_path)\n| eval endpoint_short = replace(url_path, \"/adfs/services/trust/\", \"\")\n| where (\"$endpoint_input$\"=\"*\" OR endpoint_short=\"$endpoint_input$\")\n| join type=left instance_id\n    [search index=windows_events EventCode=510 (host=*-ess-sen-adf5* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso1* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso2*)\n    | rex \"Instance ID:\\s*(?<instance_id>[0-9A-Fa-f-]{36})\"\n    | rex field=_raw \"True-Client-IP\\\":\\\"(?<source_ip>[^\\\"]+)\"\n    | where isnotnull(source_ip)\n    | dedup instance_id\n    | fields instance_id source_ip]\n| eval ip = coalesce(source_ip, client_ip, \"Unknown\")\n| where (\"$ip_input$\"=\"*\" OR ip=\"$ip_input$\")\n| stats dc(ip) as \"Unique Source IPs\"",
				"queryParameters": {
					"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$",
					"latest": "$global_time.latest$"
				}
			},
			"type": "ds.search"
		},
		"ds_unique_endpoints": {
			"name": "Unique endpoints hit",
			"options": {
				"query": "index=windows_events EventCode=403 (host=*-ess-sen-adf5* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso1* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso2*)\n| rex field=Message \"Url Absolute Path:\\s+(?<url_path>/adfs/services/trust/[^\\s]+)\"\n| where isnotnull(url_path)\n| eval endpoint_short = replace(url_path, \"/adfs/services/trust/\", \"\")\n| where (\"$endpoint_input$\"=\"*\" OR endpoint_short=\"$endpoint_input$\")\n| stats dc(url_path) as \"Unique Endpoints\"",
				"queryParameters": {
					"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$",
					"latest": "$global_time.latest$"
				}
			},
			"type": "ds.search"
		},
		"ds_top_ip": {
			"name": "Top source IP",
			"options": {
				"query": "index=windows_events EventCode=403 (host=*-ess-sen-adf5* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso1* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso2*)\n| rex field=Message \"Url Absolute Path:\\s+(?<url_path>/adfs/services/trust/[^\\s]+)\"\n| rex field=Message \"Client IP:\\s+(?<client_ip>[\\d.]+)\"\n| rex field=Message \"Instance ID:\\s+(?<instance_id>[0-9A-Fa-f-]{36})\"\n| where isnotnull(url_path)\n| eval endpoint_short = replace(url_path, \"/adfs/services/trust/\", \"\")\n| where (\"$endpoint_input$\"=\"*\" OR endpoint_short=\"$endpoint_input$\")\n| join type=left instance_id\n    [search index=windows_events EventCode=510 (host=*-ess-sen-adf5* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso1* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso2*)\n    | rex \"Instance ID:\\s*(?<instance_id>[0-9A-Fa-f-]{36})\"\n    | rex field=_raw \"True-Client-IP\\\":\\\"(?<source_ip>[^\\\"]+)\"\n    | where isnotnull(source_ip)\n    | dedup instance_id\n    | fields instance_id source_ip]\n| eval ip = coalesce(source_ip, client_ip, \"Unknown\")\n| where (\"$ip_input$\"=\"*\" OR ip=\"$ip_input$\")\n| stats count by ip\n| sort - count\n| head 1\n| eval \"Top IP\" = ip . \" | \" . count\n| fields \"Top IP\"",
				"queryParameters": {
					"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$",
					"latest": "$global_time.latest$"
				}
			},
			"type": "ds.search"
		},
		"ds_timeline": {
			"name": "Hit timeline by endpoint",
			"options": {
				"query": "index=windows_events EventCode=403 (host=*-ess-sen-adf5* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso1* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso2*)\n| rex field=Message \"Url Absolute Path:\\s+(?<url_path>/adfs/services/trust/[^\\s]+)\"\n| rex field=Message \"Client IP:\\s+(?<client_ip>[\\d.]+)\"\n| rex field=Message \"Instance ID:\\s+(?<instance_id>[0-9A-Fa-f-]{36})\"\n| where isnotnull(url_path)\n| eval endpoint_short = replace(url_path, \"/adfs/services/trust/\", \"\")\n| where (\"$endpoint_input$\"=\"*\" OR endpoint_short=\"$endpoint_input$\")\n| join type=left instance_id\n    [search index=windows_events EventCode=510 (host=*-ess-sen-adf5* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso1* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso2*)\n    | rex \"Instance ID:\\s*(?<instance_id>[0-9A-Fa-f-]{36})\"\n    | rex field=_raw \"True-Client-IP\\\":\\\"(?<source_ip>[^\\\"]+)\"\n    | where isnotnull(source_ip)\n    | dedup instance_id\n    | fields instance_id source_ip]\n| eval ip = coalesce(source_ip, client_ip, \"Unknown\")\n| where (\"$ip_input$\"=\"*\" OR ip=\"$ip_input$\")\n| timechart span=1h count by endpoint_short limit=10",
				"queryParameters": {
					"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$",
					"latest": "$global_time.latest$"
				}
			},
			"type": "ds.search"
		},
		"ds_matrix": {
			"name": "IP endpoint user server matrix",
			"options": {
				"query": "index=windows_events EventCode=403 (host=*-ess-sen-adf5* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso1* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso2*)\n| rex field=Message \"Url Absolute Path:\\s+(?<url_path>/adfs/services/trust/[^\\s]+)\"\n| rex field=Message \"Client IP:\\s+(?<client_ip>[\\d.]+)\"\n| rex field=Message \"Instance ID:\\s+(?<instance_id>[0-9A-Fa-f-]{36})\"\n| rex field=Message \"Caller Identity:\\s+(?<caller>[^\\s]+)\"\n| where isnotnull(url_path)\n| eval endpoint_short = replace(url_path, \"/adfs/services/trust/\", \"\")\n| where (\"$endpoint_input$\"=\"*\" OR endpoint_short=\"$endpoint_input$\")\n| eval server_fqdn = coalesce(ComputerName, host, \"Unknown\")\n| eval caller = if(caller=\"-\" OR isnull(caller), \"N/A\", replace(caller, \"^the organization-AD\\\\\\\\\", \"\"))\n| join type=left instance_id\n    [search index=windows_events EventCode=510 (host=*-ess-sen-adf5* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso1* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso2*)\n    | rex \"Instance ID:\\s*(?<instance_id>[0-9A-Fa-f-]{36})\"\n    | rex field=_raw \"True-Client-IP\\\":\\\"(?<source_ip>[^\\\"]+)\"\n    | where isnotnull(source_ip)\n    | dedup instance_id\n    | fields instance_id source_ip]\n| eval ip = coalesce(source_ip, client_ip, \"Unknown\")\n| where (\"$ip_input$\"=\"*\" OR ip=\"$ip_input$\")\n| stats count as Hits by endpoint_short, ip, caller, server_fqdn\n| sort - Hits\n| rename endpoint_short as Endpoint, ip as \"Source IP\", caller as User, server_fqdn as \"Server FQDN\"",
				"queryParameters": {
					"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$",
					"latest": "$global_time.latest$"
				}
			},
			"type": "ds.search"
		},
		"ds_endpoint_dist": {
			"name": "Endpoint distribution",
			"options": {
				"query": "index=windows_events EventCode=403 (host=*-ess-sen-adf5* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso1* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso2*)\n| rex field=Message \"Url Absolute Path:\\s+(?<url_path>/adfs/services/trust/[^\\s]+)\"\n| where isnotnull(url_path)\n| eval endpoint_short = replace(url_path, \"/adfs/services/trust/\", \"\")\n| where (\"$endpoint_input$\"=\"*\" OR endpoint_short=\"$endpoint_input$\")\n| stats count by endpoint_short\n| sort - count",
				"queryParameters": {
					"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$",
					"latest": "$global_time.latest$"
				}
			},
			"type": "ds.search"
		},
		"ds_site_dist": {
			"name": "Site distribution",
			"options": {
				"query": "index=windows_events EventCode=403 (host=*-ess-sen-adf5* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso1* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso2*)\n| rex field=Message \"Url Absolute Path:\\s+(?<url_path>/adfs/services/trust/[^\\s]+)\"\n| where isnotnull(url_path)\n| eval endpoint_short = replace(url_path, \"/adfs/services/trust/\", \"\")\n| where (\"$endpoint_input$\"=\"*\" OR endpoint_short=\"$endpoint_input$\")\n| eval host_upper = upper(trim(host))\n| eval site = case(\n    match(host_upper, \"^(A|P)-ESS-SEN-(ADF5|WAP5)\"), \"site-a\",\n    match(host_upper, \"^S-ESS-SEN-(SSO1|SSO2|WAP1|WAP2)\"), \"site-b\",\n    1=1, \"UNKNOWN\")\n| stats count by site",
				"queryParameters": {
					"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$",
					"latest": "$global_time.latest$"
				}
			},
			"type": "ds.search"
		},
		"ds_top_users": {
			"name": "Top users by endpoint",
			"options": {
				"query": "index=windows_events EventCode=403 (host=*-ess-sen-adf5* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso1* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso2*)\n| rex field=Message \"Url Absolute Path:\\s+(?<url_path>/adfs/services/trust/[^\\s]+)\"\n| rex field=Message \"Caller Identity:\\s+(?<caller>[^\\s]+)\"\n| where isnotnull(url_path)\n| eval endpoint_short = replace(url_path, \"/adfs/services/trust/\", \"\")\n| where (\"$endpoint_input$\"=\"*\" OR endpoint_short=\"$endpoint_input$\")\n| where isnotnull(caller) AND caller!=\"-\"\n| eval caller = replace(caller, \"^the organization-AD\\\\\\\\\", \"\")\n| stats count as Hits dc(endpoint_short) as \"Endpoints\" values(endpoint_short) as \"Endpoint List\" by caller\n| sort - Hits\n| head 20\n| rename caller as User",
				"queryParameters": {
					"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$",
					"latest": "$global_time.latest$"
				}
			},
			"type": "ds.search"
		},
		"ds_risky_hits": {
			"name": "Risky endpoint hits",
			"options": {
				"query": "index=windows_events EventCode=403 (host=*-ess-sen-adf5* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso1* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso2*)\n| rex field=Message \"Url Absolute Path:\\s+(?<url_path>/adfs/services/trust/[^\\s]+)\"\n| where isnotnull(url_path)\n| eval endpoint_short = replace(url_path, \"/adfs/services/trust/\", \"\")\n| where match(endpoint_short, \"usernamemixed|certificatemixed|certificatetransport|issuedtokenmixed|mex\")\n| stats count as \"Risky Hits\"",
				"queryParameters": {
					"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$",
					"latest": "$global_time.latest$"
				}
			},
			"type": "ds.search"
		}
	},
	"layout": {
		"globalInputs": [
			"input_global_trp",
			"input_endpoint_filter",
			"input_ip_filter"
		],
		"layoutDefinitions": {
			"layout_1": {
				"options": {
					"height": 1380,
					"width": 2100
				},
				"structure": [
					{
						"item": "viz_total_hits",
						"type": "block",
						"position": {
							"x": 0,
							"y": 0,
							"w": 410,
							"h": 100
						}
					},
					{
						"item": "viz_unique_ips",
						"type": "block",
						"position": {
							"x": 420,
							"y": 0,
							"w": 410,
							"h": 100
						}
					},
					{
						"item": "viz_unique_endpoints",
						"type": "block",
						"position": {
							"x": 840,
							"y": 0,
							"w": 420,
							"h": 100
						}
					},
					{
						"item": "viz_top_ip",
						"type": "block",
						"position": {
							"x": 1670,
							"y": 0,
							"w": 430,
							"h": 100
						}
					},
					{
						"item": "viz_timeline",
						"type": "block",
						"position": {
							"x": 0,
							"y": 110,
							"w": 2100,
							"h": 220
						}
					},
					{
						"item": "viz_endpoint_dist",
						"type": "block",
						"position": {
							"x": 0,
							"y": 340,
							"w": 1050,
							"h": 230
						}
					},
					{
						"item": "viz_site_dist",
						"type": "block",
						"position": {
							"x": 1050,
							"y": 340,
							"w": 1050,
							"h": 230
						}
					},
					{
						"item": "viz_matrix",
						"type": "block",
						"position": {
							"x": 0,
							"y": 580,
							"w": 2100,
							"h": 370
						}
					},
					{
						"item": "viz_top_users",
						"type": "block",
						"position": {
							"x": 0,
							"y": 960,
							"w": 2100,
							"h": 290
						}
					},
					{
						"item": "viz_risky_hits",
